name: Front Conference
description: Two-day UX and product management case study conference. In its 10th year, Front brings 1,000+ designers and PMs together for deep dives into solving real product problems.

name: Salt Lake Design Week
description: A week-long celebration of design in Salt Lake City featuring talks, workshops, exhibits, and networking events across all design disciplines.

name: AIGA SLC 100 Show
description: Utah's premier juried design competition. 100 pieces are selected for exhibit, with 10 awarded the Copper Ingot. Awards party, cocktails, tacos, and networking with top Utah designers.
price: Free to attend, entry fee to submit

name: Utah Design Exhibit
description: Annual showcase of outstanding design work from Utah creatives, held during Salt Lake Design Week.

name: Product Hive
description: Utah's largest product community with 7,700+ members. Volunteer-led speakers, workshops, and company visits for designers, PMs, and strategists.

name: Salt Lake Designers
description: Community of 1,300+ product, web, app, and program designers sharing ideas for new tools and techniques. Regular meetups and skill-sharing sessions.

name: ProductTank Salt Lake City
description: Part of the global ProductTank network. Talks from guest speakers, networking, and conversations about product design, development, and UX.

name: UtahJS
description: Utah's JavaScript and web development community with meetups in Lehi and SLC. Covers front-end, design systems, and creative coding — the technical side of digital design.

name: AIGA Salt Lake City
description: The local chapter of AIGA (the professional association for design). Regular events, portfolio reviews, mentorship, and networking for Utah's design community.

name: CreativePro Week
description: Five days of expert-led sessions on InDesign, Photoshop, Illustrator, presentation design, typography, and production workflows. Full virtual attendance option available.

name: Figma Config
description: Figma's annual conference for 10,000+ designers, developers, and product leaders. Keynotes, workshops, and product announcements. Livestream available.

name: AIGA National Webinars
description: Monthly virtual sessions from AIGA national — inspiration, leadership development, and connection with designers across the country.
